narrative.context: Someone you’re dating hasn’t replied all day. You feel anxious and start imagining worst-case reasons.
narrative.prompt: What understanding helps you respond effectively?

options.label: Separate feeling from conclusion
options.description: Recognize anxiety as a signal of uncertainty. Consider neutral causes (busy, phone off) and decide to check in calmly.

ei.rationale: Understands how uncertainty triggers anxiety; keeps interpretation flexible rather than definitive.

options.label: Assume they forgot, but wait
options.description: Decide it’s probably carelessness and postpone talking.

ei.rationale: Avoids escalation, but picks a single meaning without checking; partial understanding.

options.label: Assume rejection
options.description: Conclude they don’t like you and withdraw.

ei.rationale: Overgeneralizes from missing data; reduces accurate emotion understanding.

options.label: Send accusatory messages
options.description: Message repeatedly with blame about being ignored.

ei.rationale: Assumes intent without understanding; escalates conflict.
